mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, report_id, version_num, content_snapshot, change_summary, changed_by, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_version ( tenant_id, report_id, version_num, content_snapshot, change_summary, changed_by ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{reportId}, #{versionNum}, #{contentSnapshot, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{changeSummary}, #{changedBy} )
